content: Revamp foundation: dark-first theme + dark CSS tokens + new hero with cursor-reactive dot grid (NO orange/cyan gradient)
Build GSAP utility components: TextReveal (with auto-in-viewport detection), Counter, Marquee, RevealOnScroll, MagneticButton
Revamp Home page: cinematic dark hero, dot-grid bg, text-reveal H1, counters, pinned scroll story, marquee, animated stats
Revamp The Gap page: dark theme + GSAP comparison table + audience bento with reveal-on-scroll
Revamp Explore Courses page: dark theme on consultant + library, dark match badges with glow
Revamp Results page: dark theme, before/after with connecting arrow, GSAP counters on metrics
Revamp Job Risk page: dark theme, dark dial, severity styling on dark
Revamp Header/Footer/StickyMobileCta for dark theme (transparent over hero, dark blur on scroll)
Fix hero issues: dot-grid replaces orange-cyan gradient, gradient text works with split-char animations, verified on desktop screenshot
